title: symbolanthus elisabethae
intro: Symbolanthus elisabethae, also known as the Elizabeth's symbolanthus or Elizabeth's firecracker plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub-like plant native to the tropical regions of South America, known for its vibrant red and yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
